title: The Case Is Closed, Forget It
overview: Arrested on suspicion of a hit and run, a succesful architect is put in prison awaiting trial or release.  Whilst there he witnesses the grim reality of life behind bars: corrupt staff, corrupt inmates, an inhuman judicial system and the power of the Mafia.
